arts.ttl: Italy Unusually Switches to Adidas Tiro 25 Goalkeeper Kit Mid-Cycle
arts.sum: In an uncommon mid-cycle update, the Italian national team has switched their goalkeeper to the new Adidas Tiro 25 goalkeeper template despite the outfield players continuing to wear their same kits as before.

arts.ttl: Bayern's goalkeeping crisis continues with Neuer setback
arts.sum: Bayern Munich’s custodian will have to do with some more time on the sidelines after he felt discomfort in his recovery training program.
